subagent_audit.scope: read-only metric missing unit-family top-20 exact-name clusters
subagent_audit.result: Identified 302 missing unit-family metric_claim rows across 20 exact metric-name clusters with deterministic unit targets and guard requirements.

rules: Exact count metrics: total_major_felonies, violations_issued, number_of_payments, cases_adjudicated, hate_crimes_by_motivation.

Complaint basis metrics: title_vi_complaints_by_basis, employment_discrimination_complaints_by_basis, external_eeo_complaints_by_basis only when the stored value is a visible non-percent count token or the sum of two to three visible non-percent count tokens.
Enforcement metrics: total_arrests and total_summons plus category-gated enforcement_action_count values for TOS Arrests, Total Arrests, TOS C-Summ, TOS TABs, and Total Summons.
Pedestrian KSI metrics: category-gated pedestrian_fatalities and pedestrian_killed_or_severely_injured.
Exact workforce metrics: new_hires, total_workforce, workforce_by_sex_ethnicity.
Money metrics: contract_amount and license_annual_rental only with dollar/USD/money evidence.
Ridership percent increase metrics: weekday_ridership_percent_increase and weekend_ridership_percent_increase only with signed percent raw text.
Daily ridership metrics: daily_ridership only with daily/weekday/weekend/one-day plus ridership/passenger/customer evidence.

verification.result: Materialized 93067/98115 submissions; retired submissions skipped 265; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
Issues: 0; Submissions: 98115; Canonical records: 84027; Wiki pages: 7331

remaining.next_recommended_bucket: Continue metric missing-unit cleanup by exact metric-name clusters, then return to project_family other=8 and event_family other=105.
